title: Aylostera canacruzensis

The plant is a member of the genus Aylostera, which is a group of cacti native to South America. Aylostera canacruzensis is further divided into two subspecies, with Aylostera canacruzensis ssp. canacruzensis being more widely distributed. The classification of Aylostera canacruzensis is subject to ongoing research and potential revisions.
